name: Patrol Routes
description: Intercepted Imperial patrol schedules reveal all enemy positions at mission start.

name: Weapons Cache Intel
description: Intel on a nearby weapons stash provides a temporary blaster upgrade.
flavorText: Someone left this here for us. Probably.

name: Prepared Positions
description: Pre-place 2 light cover barricades before deployment.
flavorText: A little preparation goes a long way.

name: Stun Grenade Requisition
description: HQ provides a free stun grenade for this mission.

name: Emergency Medpac
description: A field medpac is included in the mission loadout.
flavorText: Standard Alliance issue. Better than nothing.

name: Flanking Route
description: Expand the operative deployment zone by 2 tiles.
flavorText: There's a maintenance tunnel that opens behind their line.

name: Communications Jamming
description: Jam Imperial comms to reduce effective threat by 3.
flavorText: They can't call for backup if they can't call at all.

name: Tactical Briefing
description: Thorough pre-mission briefing grants 2 extra tactic cards at start.

name: Objective Reconnaissance
description: Forward scouts mark all objective locations on your map.
flavorText: X marks the spot. Several spots, actually.

name: Ambush Setup
description: Operatives get a free activation before the first round begins.

name: Suppressed Sentries
description: One enemy group starts suppressed from a pre-mission sniper shot.
flavorText: That shot came from nowhere. Keep your heads down!

name: Forward Barricades
description: Pre-place 3 light cover barricades in tactical positions.
flavorText: Rebel engineers work fast under pressure.

name: Thermal Detonator Requisition
description: Special operations provides a thermal detonator for this mission.

name: Threat Analysis
description: Detailed threat assessment reduces mission threat by 2.

name: Scrambled Orders
description: Sliced enemy comms leave one group disoriented at the start.
flavorText: They're receiving contradictory orders. For now.
